item.title: This is exactly why we need to be teaching boys that yes, they can get sexually assaulted too, that consent goes both ways!! If it shouldn't be done to a girl then it done to a bloke!!! Consent goes both ways!
item.description: I don't know how old this post is, but it's so important men to know that they can talk about these things, that yes you get sexually assaulted too! If you know it shouldn't happen to a woman, then it shouldn't happen to you either!! I really hope that guy is ok and doing well now!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Squid Ink Mishap at a China Restaurant
item.description: "Is it gone?" "Nah, if it were (that easy to clean), the waitress would have cleaned hers off." Video cut to said waitress just doing her job with the inked face.
item.dc:creator: Joyousjoyfuljoyness

item.title: Taking names & kicking ... :)
item.dc:creator: Luvlyquants

item.title: My Twentyfifth Dump
item.description:
Today's bait image is NOT of a frog, but another pretty lady, and this time I actually know who it is, which... is a first.
You guys, I had a thought.
The closer this reverse image-posting journey gets to the present day, the less of a time machine it becomes.
And more of a "Oh yeah I remember that from a few months ago" or a "I saw that in another dump just recently.
Hopefully that doesn't make it any less entertaining though.
ANYWAY LET'S--- oh, a frog.
ANYWAY LET'S-- oh I have to send this to my DM.
ANYWAY LET'S GOOOOO!!
One for the looneybin inhabitants.
The last remnant of the Oceangate marker from the last dump.
Hey, 'member when Twitter limited the amount of tweets you could see without paying? 'member?
Oh, a good news! How did that get in here?
One for the dnd crowd.
Badum-tss!
I genuinely laughed out loud like a lunatic the first time I saw this gem.
[crimson nirnroot sound]
I'mmmmmmm not sorry.
A Ukraine war meme! 'member when they blew up that bridge?
Legend.
Another good news! Really warms your heart.
Someone else might have gotten it wrong.
... there are some really specific memes in this dump, huh. Niche. And not a lot of frogs! For shame.
See y'all tomorrow!
item.dc:creator: Kateness

item.title: For Me to Laugh at Later 42

item.dc:creator: DrWalters

item.title: A portrait I drew for my mom
item.description:
The portrait I drew for my mom. I haven't seen her in a while and not sure when I'm gonna see her again, if ever. I miss her terribly and for her birthday I made this portrait, it's a digital art made in Photoshop but my sister was able to print it on canvas and frame it as an actual painting. Doesn't look as good as oils but not bad either! Sadly I don't have a decent picture of the final result on hands.
This is my main reference.
And this is how she preferred to wear her hair. She looked terrific as a blondie with those long waves. I'm new here and honestly I have no idea how to make a proper post yet. Been a lurker for a long time and the community in here seems friendly, so I decided to join! I'm a digital artist (I do traditional drawing, too, but mainly I prefer to stick to my Photoshop and tablet), is it okay to share works that I do?
item.dc:creator: OddAmbrette

item.title: Kobe, Japan is in full bloom
item.dc:creator: shogaganai

item.title: Every year around US tax time, this makes its rounds
item.description: It’s not a joke, there are truly people who make this argument. I always find this very whiny. -the tax form that you likely needed to use in high school was a 1040ez. It was simple addition and subtraction. If you couldn’t figure it out, you shouldn’t have graduated -your school likely had a business class that would teach you about taxes, I know people who took it -yes, years later you might need to use other forms but it is unlikely that you would remember what they taught you about those forms -the tax laws change quite often -the laws governing parallelograms have not changed since you learned them
item.dc:creator: Fanner50

item.title: It's time for the unhinged XL CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i am so happy to see this guy doing/looking well. and this is wholesome af. greetings friends
i just don't get why the table outline seems unfinished.. artistic choice?
good times
i'm sorry what
the regular pizza part looks good to me
looks like actor James Spader
minecwaft
aren't we all
mmm hmm
wasn't that something?
why is his mouth red
do it
Danny is 4 ft 10 in
man that burder looks good. guac and bacon? hell yeah
always used to wish i could do that. still do i guess.
tough to argue with this
not a deal breaker for me, unless she wanted me to physically transform into Randy or something like that. heck, even then probably
that's my set.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: lmao, captain "free speech" is at it again...
item.description: Tweet link : https://x.com/simbasad2/status/1776957819788402938 For context - Elon claims to believe in "free speech", but has instructed his social media site to limit visibility of the prefix "cis" because it's allegedly a slur. Not the N-word. Not antisemitic shit. But "cis".
